decision-tree.root-question: Do the inputs satisfy the preconditions in `## Applies If` (named trigger + named owner + typed inputs)?

branch.question: Is the trigger's blast radius above the methodology's materiality threshold (e.g. production-affecting, customer-visible, regulator-relevant)?

branch.conclusion: Produce the full artefact per `02-output-contract.xml` with every section filled, evidence anchored, owner assigned, review scheduled.
Produce the minimal-record fallback — owner, trigger, decision, evidence, review — and skip optional narrative sections. Still committed, still reviewable.
Skip this methodology. Route the work back to the upstream queue (trigger refinement, owner assignment, observability fix) before reapplying.

example.p: Trigger fired (quarterly cadence), owner resolved (`arch:alice`), inputs typed — preconditions satisfied. Blast radius is production-affecting → full-artefact branch → conclusion r2.
